installCommand: if [ -d "flutter" ]; then echo "Flutter exists"; else git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable; fi
buildCommand: PROJECT_DIR=$(dirname $(find . -path ./flutter -prune -o -name pubspec.yaml -print | head -n 1)) && cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && $OLDPWD/flutter/bin/flutter build web --no-tree-shake-icons && cd $OLDPWD && rm -rf final_web && mkdir final_web && cp -r "$PROJECT_DIR/build/web/"* final_web/
